name: backfill-candidates.js
purpose: One-shot migration fix: reads extraction-journal.jsonl and backfills empty candidates[] arrays in analysis.json for repos where v2->v3 migration left 9 repos with no candidates despite journal entries.
notes: Migration script; safe to run multiple times (idempotent). CAS subsystem.

name: backfill-tags.js
purpose: Backfills empty tags in extraction-journal.jsonl entries by pulling tags from matching source analysis.json. Uses fuzzy slug matching to correlate journal entries to sources.
notes: One-shot migration. CAS subsystem. Fuzzy slug match handles partial URL path differences.

name: fix-depth-mislabel.js
purpose: One-shot fixer for 9 repos mislabeled depth=quick that had full standard artifacts. Exports REQUIRED_STANDARD_ARTIFACTS, MISLABELED_SLUGS, hasFullStandardArtifacts, fixAnalysisJson for testing.
notes: Named exports allow unit testing without executing fix. CAS subsystem.

name: generate-extractions-md.js
purpose: Generates .research/EXTRACTIONS.md from extraction-journal.jsonl: TOC table of sources with candidate counts and per-source sections with each candidate title/status/tags. Atomic write via safeAtomicWriteSync.
notes: Output: .research/EXTRACTIONS.md. Read by llmstxt generator as part of research artifacts index.

name: migrate-schemas.js
purpose: Normalizes all analysis.json files under .research/ to unified v3.0 schema. Spawns rebuild-index.js after migration via child_process.execFileSync. Uses crypto.randomUUID() for new ID generation.
notes: Shells out via execFileSync to rebuild-index.js. CAS migration script.

name: migrate-v3.js
purpose: Idempotent fixer for incomplete v3 schema migrations: fills analyzed_at from mtime, fixes scoring, generates tags from candidates, self-heals depth quick->standard. Safe to re-run.
notes: Idempotent. CAS subsystem.

name: promote-firecrawl-to-journal.js
purpose: One-shot script promoting firecrawl value-map.json candidates to extraction-journal.jsonl. Has duplicate-guard preventing re-ingestion of already-present entries.
notes: One-shot tool; firecrawl is a SoNash-specific web scraping tool.

name: rebuild-index.js
purpose: Creates/rebuilds SQLite database (content-analysis.db) from scratch. Tables: sources, extractions, tags, source_tags, extraction_tags plus FTS5 virtual tables (porter unicode61 tokenizer). Full rebuild strategy.
notes: External dep: better-sqlite3. FTS5 with porter+unicode61 tokenizer. Called by migrate-schemas.js and retag.js via spawnSync.

name: recall.js
purpose: CLI query interface for content-analysis.db SQLite. Supports FTS5 full-text search, tag/type/source/sort filters. Reads .research/tag-vocabulary.json for semantic tag classification (technical/domain/quality categories).
notes: External dep: better-sqlite3. Reads .research/tag-vocabulary.json. Interactive CLI.

name: retag.js
purpose: Batch retag tool for extraction-journal.jsonl. Subcommands: apply (batch retag with vocab update), validate (report forbidden/unknown/low-semantic tags). Uses withLock() for atomic journal+vocabulary writes. Spawns rebuild-index via spawnSync.
notes: withLock() prevents concurrent writes to journal+vocab. Spawns rebuild-index for index consistency.

name: self-audit.js
purpose: Self-audits CAS analysis output against CONVENTIONS.md S13. Validates MUST/SHOULD artifacts, Zod schema, extraction decisions, behavioral state file, Step 10.5 extended checks (citation counts, home-repo ref validity, journal>=value-map, EXTRACTIONS.md section, per-candidate schema, tag consistency, last_synthesized_at, trends.jsonl).
notes: Uses Zod for schema validation. SoNash CAS quality gate.

name: update-index.js
purpose: Incremental SQLite index update for a single slug. Auto-creates DB if missing. Called by /analyze router after handler finishes to keep index in sync without full rebuild.
notes: External dep: better-sqlite3. Lightweight alternative to rebuild-index.js for incremental updates.

name: audit-health-check.js
purpose: 9-category health check of the TDMS/audit system: category dirs, schema categories, state-manager categories, AUDIT_TRACKER existence, orphaned audit dirs, stale baselines, ecosystem audit skill dirs (7 checks), state files, lib consistency. Reads scripts/config/audit-schema.json and scripts/multi-ai/state-manager.js.
notes: Reads state-manager.js via require() for VALID_CATEGORIES constant -- tight cross-subsystem coupling.

name: compare-audits.js
purpose: Compares two audit runs (by date) for a category. Detects new/resolved/severity-changed/recurring findings. Uses Jaccard similarity for title deduplication. Reads from docs/audits/single-session directory structure.
notes: Jaccard similarity threshold for title comparison. SoNash-specific directory structure.

name: count-commits-since.js
purpose: Parses AUDIT_TRACKER.md table to extract last-audit dates per category, then calls git log --oneline --since=<date> to count commits since last audit. Used to determine if a new audit is warranted.
notes: Shells out via execFileSync to git. tool_deps=[git].

name: generate-results-index.js
purpose: Scans all audit output directories (single-session, comprehensive, multi-ai) and generates docs/audits/RESULTS_INDEX.md atomically. Uses own guardSymlink + safeWriteFileSync + safeRenameSync sequence.
notes: Implements own atomic write sequence rather than safeAtomicWriteSync -- slight deviation from project pattern.

name: post-audit.js
purpose: Pipeline orchestrator: runs TDMS intake -> generate-views -> generate-metrics -> generate-results-index in sequence. Uses execFileSync with process.execPath per exec-path propagation pattern.
notes: Correctly uses process.execPath per propagation pattern. Pipeline orchestrator.

name: pre-audit-check.js
purpose: 6 pre-flight checks before running an audit: output dirs writable, FALSE_POSITIVES.jsonl exists, TDMS pipeline scripts present, JSONL_SCHEMA_STANDARD.md exists, audit-schema.json valid, MASTER_DEBT.jsonl parseable.
notes: SoNash-specific paths for all checks.

name: track-resolutions.js
purpose: Cross-references MASTER_DEBT.jsonl with git log history. Classifies findings as: likely_resolved (file deleted or >=3 commits since creation), potentially_resolved (1-2 commits), still_open (0 commits), unknown. --apply flag writes RESOLVED status.
notes: Shells out via execFileSync to git. tool_deps=[git]. TDMS maintenance tool.

name: transform-jsonl-schema.js
purpose: Transforms old TDMS JSONL field names to current schema: id->fingerprint, file+line->files[], description->why_it_matters, recommendation->suggested_fix, confidence string->number. Supports --all flag for batch processing docs/audits/comprehensive/.
notes: Consumer of load-config subsystem (require('../config/load-config')).

name: validate-audit-integration.js
purpose: Validates TDMS audit integration with subcommands: capture-baseline, validate-jsonl, validate-stage (1/2/3), validate-tdms-intake, compare-baseline, generate-report. Validates S0/S1 verification_steps structure. Uses loadConfig('audit-schema').
notes: Consumer of load-config subsystem via loadConfig('audit-schema'). Stage validation enforces S0/S1 must have verification_steps.

name: validate-templates.js
purpose: Validates 9 multi-AI audit templates in docs/audits/multi-ai/templates/. 10 checks per template (H1, canonical category, min lines, purpose/scope, prompt/instructions, sub-categories, output format, quality guardrails, TDMS integration, JSONL example). Exit 0 if >=70% compliance.
notes: Template path hardcoded to SoNash docs/audits/multi-ai/templates/. 70% pass threshold.

name: generate-llms-txt.js
purpose: Generates /llms.txt per llmstxt.org spec. Reads CLAUDE.md for project summary (## Purpose section), scans .claude/skills/*/SKILL.md for skill registry. Custom YAML frontmatter parser (no js-yaml dep). Exports functions for testing. Atomic write via safeAtomicWriteSync.
notes: Hardcoded SoNash product description in buildHeaderLines() must be updated per project. Core structure (skill scanner, YAML parser, atomic write) is portable. Exports module functions for test coverage.

name: dedup-review-metrics.js
purpose: Deduplicates .claude/state/review-metrics.jsonl by PR number keeping latest by timestamp. Also reconciles review_rounds from reviews.jsonl. Atomic write via safeAtomicWriteSync.
notes: test_coverage=true: __tests__/dedup-review-metrics.test.js exists. CJS module.

name: review-churn-tracker.js
purpose: Tracks PR review fix ratio and review rounds by querying gh CLI. Writes to .claude/state/review-metrics.jsonl. Uses upsert guard (v3.0) to prevent duplicate entries. ESM module despite .js extension.
notes: ESM (import statements). Shells out via gh CLI. Module system MISMATCH with dedup-review-metrics.js in same directory (CJS). Module type inconsistency in metrics/ directory.

name: aggregate-category.js
purpose: Aggregates multi-AI audit findings per category from raw/ JSONL sources. Multi-tier dedup: fingerprint -> file:line -> title similarity (Levenshtein, threshold 0.8). Assigns CANON-XXXX IDs. Writes to <session>/canon/CANON-<CATEGORY>.jsonl.
notes: ESM (export async function). Uses createRequire to import CJS parse-jsonl-line. Levenshtein title similarity threshold 0.8.

name: extract-agent-findings.js
purpose: Extracts JSONL findings from agent conversation output files (transcripts). Handles multi-line JSON with brace-depth tracker. Normalizes file paths from absolute to relative. Path traversal validation on CLI args.
notes: CJS module. Was previously hardcoded to Windows path (fixed per D1d note). Brace-depth tracker shared pattern with normalize-format.js.

name: fix-schema.js
purpose: Post-normalization schema fixer. Field alias mapping (description->why_it_matters, recommendation->suggested_fix, etc.). Severity/effort normalization (critical->S0, high->S1, etc.). Fingerprint generation via md5 of title. Confidence penalty system (-30 no files, -20 no title, -25 recovered JSON, -30 plain-text).
notes: ESM (export function fixSchema). Field-alias and severity/effort normalization logic is schema-portable if TDMS field names carry over.

name: normalize-format.js
purpose: Converts ANY input format (JSONL, JSON array, markdown table, headed sections, numbered list, fenced code blocks, plain text) to normalized JSONL array. Exports detectFormat, normalizeFormat, processFile, FORMAT_TYPES. Core format-detection and parsing engine for multi-AI audit pipeline.
notes: ESM (export function). Brace-depth tracker shared with extract-agent-findings.js. Format-agnostic parsing is potentially portable.

name: state-manager.js
purpose: Session state manager for multi-AI audit workflow. State persists to .claude/multi-ai-audit/ (compaction-safe). Backup to docs/audits/multi-ai/<session>/state.json. Session ID format: maa-YYYY-MM-DD-<random6>. Exports createSession, loadSession, updateSession, updateCategoryState, addSourceToCategory, completeSession, clearSession, getSessionSummary.
notes: ESM module. Non-standard state path: .claude/multi-ai-audit/ (confirmed D1d flag). Session ID regex-validated against path traversal. VALID_CATEGORIES hardcoded list must be updated per project taxonomy.

name: unify-findings.js
purpose: Unifies findings across all audit categories. Loads all CANON-*.jsonl files, detects cross-cutting issues (same file in multiple categories), merges related findings, identifies dependency chains, generates final priority ranking. Outputs: final/UNIFIED-FINDINGS.jsonl + final/SUMMARY.md.
notes: ESM async function. Priority scoring: (severityWeight * crossCuttingMultiplier * confidenceWeight) / effortWeight + consensusBonus. SoNash-specific session directory structure.

name: load-config.js
purpose: Shared JSON config loader. loadConfig(name) loads JSON from scripts/config/<name>.json with path-traversal guard (rejects names with .., /, backslash). loadConfigWithRegex(name, fields) converts {source, flags} regex descriptor objects to RegExp instances recursively. Exports via module.exports.
notes: CJS module. Primary abstraction over config/ JSON files. Consumers: transform-jsonl-schema.js, validate-audit-integration.js. Path traversal prevention via explicit name validation. Regex conversion is recursive and field-filtered.

name: audit-schema.json
purpose: Canonical TDMS audit schema enums: validCategories (9 audit categories), validSeverities (S0-S3), validTypes (7 types: bug/code-smell/vulnerability/hotspot/tech-debt/process-gap/enhancement), validStatuses (5: NEW/VERIFIED/FALSE_POSITIVE/IN_PROGRESS/RESOLVED), validEfforts (E0-E3), requiredFields.
notes: Consumed by: validate-audit-integration.js (via loadConfig), pre-audit-check.js, audit-health-check.js, hook-checks.json (audit-s0s1 and debt-schema checks). 9 categories are the core TDMS taxonomy.

name: audit-config.json
purpose: Audit trigger thresholds per category (commits+files required to trigger audit) with file pattern regexes. multiAiThresholds (totalCommits>=300, daysSinceAudit>=30). categoryHeaders regex patterns. Contains {source,flags} regex descriptors consumed via loadConfigWithRegex().
notes: SoNash-specific thresholds. Only 6 of 9 TDMS categories have file patterns defined. Must be adapted per project.

name: skill-config.json
purpose: Skill validation config: requiredSections per skill type, deprecatedPatterns (TODO:/FIXME/PLACEHOLDER regex), topicAliases mapping skill topics to synonym lists (firebase, auth, tests, security, hooks, api, build, lint, ci, docs, performance, react, regex).
notes: topicAliases are SoNash-specific (firebase, react). Core validation patterns (TODO/FIXME/PLACEHOLDER) are portable. Consumed by skill-validation hook check.

name: skill-registry.json
purpose: Auto-generated registry of all 59 skills in .claude/skills/. Fields: name, source, displayName, description. Generated at 2026-03-07. Consumed by skill-validation hook check.
notes: 59 skills are SoNash-specific. Auto-generated; not manually maintained. JASON-OS would have a different skill set and this would be regenerated.

name: agent-triggers.json
purpose: Agent trigger rules: file patterns that trigger review agents (code-reviewer for TS/JS, security-auditor for functions/firestore.rules). reviewChangeThreshold=5 files. Regex descriptors with excludePaths.
notes: Agents and trigger paths (functions/src, firestore.rules) are SoNash-specific. Consumed by triggers hook check.

name: category-mappings.json
purpose: TDMS category alias normalization. defaultCategory=code-quality. Aliases map shorthand inputs to canonical category names (e.g., 'code'->code-quality, 'docs'->documentation, 'Hygiene/Duplication'->code-quality).
notes: Core aliases portable; Hygiene/Duplication, Types/Correctness, Next/React Boundaries are SoNash-specific. Consumed by audit intake scripts.

name: ai-patterns.json
purpose: Pattern registry for AI-introduced anti-patterns with severity ratings: HAPPY_PATH_ONLY (S1), TRIVIAL_ASSERTIONS (S1), AI_TODO_MARKERS (S3), SESSION_BOUNDARY (S2), OVERCONFIDENT_SECURITY (S2), HALLUCINATED_APIS (S1), NAIVE_DATA_FETCH (S1), UNBOUNDED_QUERY (S2). Consumed by pattern-compliance hook checks.
notes: HALLUCINATED_APIS and NAIVE_DATA_FETCH/UNBOUNDED_QUERY are Firebase-specific. First 5 patterns are project-agnostic and portable. Consumed by hook-checks.json pattern-compliance checks.

name: doc-dependencies.json
purpose: Cross-document dependency rules mapping trigger file/directory changes to dependent documents that must be updated (e.g., ROADMAP.md -> SESSION_CONTEXT.md; .husky/ -> DEVELOPMENT.md). Used by cross-doc-deps hook check.
notes: All trigger paths and dependent doc paths are SoNash-specific (app/admin/, functions/src/admin, etc.). Rule structure (trigger/dependents/reason/diffPattern) is a portable schema.

name: doc-generator-config.json
purpose: Documentation index generator config: excludeDirs/Files, archiveDirs, outputFile, maxDescriptionLength, tierDescriptions (1=Canonical Living...5=Guides), categories (dir->tier/name mapping), fileOverrides (per-file tier overrides).
notes: Category and fileOverrides are SoNash-specific directory structure. Tier system (1-5) and tier descriptions are portable. Consumed by doc-index hook check.

name: doc-header-config.json
purpose: Document header validation config. exemptPatterns (files/dirs that do not need headers: README, CHANGELOG, node_modules, archives, etc.). requiredHeaders (Document Version, Last Updated, Status). recommendedHeaders (Related/See Also, Purpose).
notes: Core required/recommended headers are portable JASON-OS conventions. Exempt patterns are mostly project-agnostic. Consumed by doc-headers hook check.

name: hook-checks.json
purpose: Canonical registry of ALL pre-commit and pre-push hook checks (schema_version=1). 20 checks with full metadata: id, name, hook, wave, command, blocking mode (block/warn/auto-fix), escalation_blocking, skip_flag, exit_codes, condition, parallel_group, timeout_ms, dependencies, writes_to, reads_from, actions, category, sws_tenets.
notes: Hook check registry is the authoritative source for all gate behavior. Wave numbers 0-13 (pre-commit) and 0-9 (pre-push). Many hook commands are SoNash-specific but registry structure and gate metadata are portable. Consumed by audit-health-check.js.

name: propagation-patterns.json
purpose: Registry of code patterns requiring propagation sweeps (version=1). 10 patterns: sanitize-error, safe-to-write, lstat-symlink, validate-path, escape-cell, exec-path, safe-write-file, path-traversal, refuse-symlink, number-nan. Each has description, correct/incorrect regex, searchGlob, severity (BLOCK/WARN), source (PR reference).
notes: These are JASON-OS security patterns (path traversal, symlink guards, error sanitization). Highly portable; same patterns enforced in JASON-OS CLAUDE.md S5. Works with known-propagation-baseline.json. Consumed by check-propagation-staged.js and check-propagation.js.

name: known-propagation-baseline.json
purpose: Baseline suppression list for propagation pattern checks (version=2, updated=2026-04-05). Lists file+pattern-key combinations that are pre-existing violations exempted from enforcement. Only NEW violations trigger alerts. Very large file (>55K tokens).
notes: SoNash-specific baseline of pre-existing violations at enforcement rollout. Any ported project starts fresh with an empty baseline. Large file indicates many legacy exceptions. Consumed by check-propagation-staged.js.

name: verified-patterns.json
purpose: Verified security pattern registry (schema_version=1, updated=2026-04-03). 12+ patterns with id, anti_pattern description, positive_pattern_ref (POSITIVE_PATTERNS.md section), enforcement mechanism, severity (critical/high). Covers: error-sanitization, path-traversal, toctou-race, exec-global-flag, unsafe-writefile, direct-firestore-write, unsafe-shell-interpolation, jsonl-parse-no-try-catch, path-separator-mismatch, cyclomatic-complexity, unsafe-gha-interpolation.
notes: direct-firestore-write is SoNash-specific. All others are portable security patterns aligned with JASON-OS CLAUDE.md S5. References POSITIVE_PATTERNS.md. Consumed by code-reviewer agent.
